Eligibility rollover matrix

Eligibility rollover summary

Eligibility rollover matrix

Eligibility rollover matrices matter when operators need a compact map of which recovery allowances can roll forward after an exception window closes.

The matrix ties rollover tiers to grace thresholds, fallback regions, and the dashboard checks required before another cycle is granted.

It also makes clear where shared throughput stability overrides local rollover requests.
